NN_CORE_ALL_OPTOUT_NVGTN_SW 

LABEL: All Core HRSNs: Opted Out of Further Navigation Services 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): all navigated core health related social needs (HRSNs); opted out of further 
navigation services. 

LONG NAME: NN_CORE_ALL_OPTOUT_NVGTN_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 
Missing
